---
title: "Brett Hartlaub"
image: images/IMG_4137.PNG
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/BrettHartlaub
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:brettjhartlaub@gmail.com
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/brett-hartlaub-456768297/
---

::: {#bio}
This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
